methods.name: deploy
methods.desc: Deploy the contract, setting the owner as provided and initializing global state.

methods.name: update
methods.desc: Allows the owner to update the smart contract

methods.name: destroy
methods.desc: Destroy the smart contract, sending all Algo to the owner account. This can only be done if there are no active card funds

methods.name: setWithdrawalTimeout

args.name: seconds
args.desc: New number of seconds to wait

methods.desc: Set the number of seconds a withdrawal request must wait until being withdrawn

methods.name: setEarlyWithdrawalPubkey

args.name: pubkey
args.desc: - The public key to set.

methods.desc: Sets the early withdrawal public key.

methods.name: getPartnerChannelMbr

args.name: partnerChannelName
args.desc: - The name of the partner channel.

returns.desc: The minimum balance requirement for creating a partner channel account.

methods.desc: Retrieves the minimum balance requirement for creating a partner channel account.

methods.name: partnerChannelCreate

args.name: mbr
args.desc: - The PayTxn object representing the payment transaction.

args.name: partnerChannelName
args.desc: - The name of the partner channel.

returns.desc: The address of the newly created partner channel account.

methods.desc:
Creates a partner channel account and associates it with the provided partner channel name.
Only the owner of the contract can call this function.

methods.name: getCardFundMbr

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset to opt-in to. 0 = No asset opt-in

returns.desc: Minimum balance requirement for creating a card fund account

methods.desc: Retrieves the minimum balance requirement for creating a card fund account.

methods.name: cardFundCreate

args.name: mbr
args.desc: Payment transaction of minimum balance requirement

args.name: partnerChannel
args.desc: Funding Channel name

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset to opt-in to. 0 = No asset opt-in

returns.desc: Newly generated account used by their card

methods.desc: Create account. This generates a brand new account and funds the minimum balance requirement

methods.name: cardFundClose

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: Address to close

methods.desc: Close account. This permanently removes the rekey and deletes the account from the ledger

methods.name: cardFundRecover

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: - The card fund to recover.

args.name: newCardFundHolder
args.desc: - The address of the new card holder.

methods.desc:
Recovers funds from an old card and transfers them to a new card.
Only the owner of the contract can perform this operation.

methods.name: getAssetAllowlistMbr

returns.desc: Minimum balance requirement for adding an asset to the allowlist

methods.desc: Retrieves the minimum balance requirement for adding an asset to the allowlist.

methods.name: assetAllowlistAdd

args.name: mbr
args.desc: Payment transaction of minimum balance requirement.

args.name: asset
args.desc: The AssetID of the asset being transferred.

methods.desc: Allows the master contract to flag intent of accepting an asset.

methods.name: assetAllowlistRemove

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The AssetID of the asset being transferred.

methods.desc: Allows the master contract to reject accepting an asset.

methods.name: cardFundDebit

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: The card fund from which the asset will be debited.

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be debited.

args.name: amount
args.desc: The amount of the asset to be debited.

methods.desc:
Debits the specified amount of the given asset from the card account.
Only the owner of the contract can perform this operation.

methods.name: getRefundAddress
methods.desc: Retrieves the refund address.

methods.name: setRefundAddress

args.name: newRefundAddress
args.desc: The new refund address to be set.

methods.desc:
Sets the refund address.
Only the owner of the contract can call this method.

methods.name: cardFundRefund

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: - The card account to refund the asset to.

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The asset to refund.

args.name: amount
args.desc: - The amount of the asset to refund.

methods.desc:
Refunds a specified amount of an asset to a card account.
Only the owner of the contract can perform this operation.

methods.name: getNextSettlementNonce
methods.desc: Retrieves the next available nonce for settlements.

methods.name: getNextCardFundNonce

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: The card fund address.

returns.desc: The nonce for the card fund.

methods.desc: Retrieves the next available nonce for the card fund.

methods.name: getCardFundWithdrawalNonce

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: The card fund address.

returns.desc: The nonce for the card fund.

methods.desc: Retrieves the next available nonce for the card fund.

methods.name: getCardFundData

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: The address of the card fund.

methods.desc: Retrieves the card fund data for a given card fund address.

methods.name: getSettlementAddress

args.name: asset
args.desc: The ID of the asset.

returns.desc: The settlement address for the asset.

methods.desc: Retrieves the settlement address for the specified asset.

methods.name: setSettlementAddress

args.name: settlementAsset
args.desc: The ID of the settlement asset.

args.name: newSettlementAddress
args.desc: The new settlement address to be set.

methods.desc:
Sets the settlement address for a given settlement asset.
Only the owner of the contract can call this method.

methods.name: settle

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be transferred.

args.name: amount
args.desc: The amount of the asset to be transferred.

args.name: nonce
args.desc: The nonce to prevent duplicate settlements.

methods.desc:
Settles a payment by transferring an asset to the specified recipient.
Only the owner of the contract can call this function.

methods.name: getCardFundAssetMbr

returns.desc: The minimum balance requirement for adding an asset to the card fund.

methods.desc: Retrieves the minimum balance requirement for adding an asset to the card fund.

methods.name: cardFundEnableAsset

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: Address to add asset to

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset to add

methods.desc: Allows the depositor (or owner) to OptIn to an asset, increasing the minimum balance requirement of the account

methods.name: cardFundDisableAsset

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: - The address of the card.

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The ID of the asset to be removed.

methods.desc: Allows the depositor (or owner) to CloseOut of an asset, reducing the minimum balance requirement of the account

methods.name: cardFundInitPermissionlessWithdrawal

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: Address to withdraw from

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset to withdraw

args.name: amount
args.desc: Amount to withdraw

methods.desc: Allows the Card Holder (or contract owner) to send an amount of assets from the account

methods.name: cardFundWithdrawalCancel

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: Address to withdraw from

methods.desc: Allows the Card Holder (or contract owner) to cancel a withdrawal request

methods.name: cardFundExecutePermissionlessWithdrawal

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: Address to withdraw from

methods.desc: Allows the Card Holder to send an amount of assets from the account

methods.name: cardFundExecuteApprovedWithdrawal

args.name: cardFund
args.desc: - The address of the card.

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The ID of the asset to be withdrawn.

args.name: amount
args.desc: - The amount of the withdrawal.

args.name: expiresAt
args.desc: - The expiry of the withdrawal signature.

args.name: signature
args.desc: - The signature for early withdrawal.

methods.desc: Withdraws funds before the withdrawal timestamp has lapsed, by using the early withdrawal signature provided by baanx.

methods.name: recoverAsset

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset ID of the asset to recover. If 0, Algo will be recovered.

args.name: amount
args.desc: Amount of the asset to recover. If Algos, remember the minimum balance requirement.

args.name: recipient
args.desc: Address to send the recovered asset to.

methods.desc: Recover an asset sent to the contract by mistake. Only the owner can call this function.

methods.name: transferOwnership

args.name: newOwner
args.desc: The address of the new owner.

methods.desc:
Transfers the ownership of the contract to a new owner.
Requires the caller to be the current owner.
